summary: ai-chat-helper exfiltrates host information to attacker-controlled C2
details: The package ships collect.js, which imports child_process, fs, os, http, and https, reads host identity (os.hostname(), os.homedir()), enumerates the filesystem with fs.existsSync, and POSTs collected data to the hardcoded endpoint http://aab.sportsontheweb.net. The destination is unrelated to the package's stated purpose, is served over plaintext HTTP, and is wired directly into the module's code rather than exposed as a configurable parameter. The combination of system-info collection, filesystem reads, child_process availability, and a hardcoded non-publisher exfiltration URL is the canonical shape of a credential/host reconnaissance beacon.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
